import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get callbacks detals for a signature request"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/signature-requests/{SR_ID}/callbacks"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



In certain scenarios, it is beneficial to view and verify the status of
callbacks for a `SignatureRequest`. For example, you might want to confirm
whether a callback has already been executed or to identify any errors that
occurred during the callback process.


This endpoint provides the capability to obtain detailed information about
the callbacks associated with a `SignatureRequest`, enabling comprehensive
monitoring and troubleshooting. By using this endpoint, you can ensure the
reliability and accuracy of your callback operations and quickly address any
issues that may arise.


**Result**


If no callback has been called yet, the response will be an empty array.
Otherwise it will contain an array of `callback` objects that were already
executed.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
